meaning: n.[地](纹泥或其他沉积物的)远程并置对比(用于确定年代)
examples: In this paper, air-sea thermal teleconnection is analyzed.
The AO can make the anomaly like the EU teleconnection, so it can influence East Asia climate.
At this frequency band EU and ea teleconnection patterns can be excited by the thermal forcing of the variation of the sea ice cover.
